name: io.github.Ansvar-Systems/ch-pest-management
description: Swiss crop protection and pest management data: pests, diseases, weeds, approved products (BLW Pflanzenschutzmittelverzeichnis), IPM guidance, OELN Schadschwellen, prognosis systems

tools.name: about
tools.description: Server metadata, dataset statistics, freshness, and provenance. No input parameters needed.

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all data sources with authority, URL, license, and freshness info.

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Check when data was last ingested, staleness status, and how to trigger a refresh.

tools.name: search_pests
tools.description: Search pests, diseases, and weeds affecting Swiss crops. Supports German and English queries with tiered FTS5 search.

tools.name: get_pest_details
tools.description: Get full profile for a pest: lifecycle, identification, crops affected, and treatments.

tools.name: get_treatments
tools.description: Get approved chemical and non-chemical controls for a specific pest. Includes products, active substances, and OELN alternatives.

tools.name: get_ipm_guidance
tools.description: Get IPM guidance for a crop: OELN Schadschwellen, monitoring methods, cultural controls, prognosis systems.

tools.name: search_crop_threats
tools.description: List all pests, diseases, and weeds that threaten a specific crop, with damage thresholds and monitoring advice.

tools.name: identify_from_symptoms
tools.description: Identify a pest, disease, or weed from symptom descriptions. Returns ranked differential diagnosis.

tools.name: get_approved_products
tools.description: Search approved plant protection products from the BLW Pflanzenschutzmittelverzeichnis. Filter by active substance, target pest, or crop.

remoteInstructions: This server provides Swiss crop protection data from the BLW Pflanzenschutzmittelverzeichnis, Agroscope, AGRIDEA, and the Aktionsplan Pflanzenschutzmittel. Use search_pests for broad queries, get_pest_details for full profiles, get_treatments for control options, get_ipm_guidance for OELN thresholds and monitoring, search_crop_threats for all threats to a crop, identify_from_symptoms for differential diagnosis, and get_approved_products for BLW-registered products.
